## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for new logic
- [ ] Updated docs (`README.md` / `AGENTS.md`) if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if users would notice
- [ ] Database schema change? Migration logic added in `server/db/database.js`
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` values in the diff
- [ ] PR title is a clear, imperative-mood squash-commit message
